app.title: VoxRox Mail
app.startingBackendHint: The first launch may take a moment.
app.startingBackendVerySlow: Still starting. You can retry the connection, restart the local service, or download diagnostics once the backend is reachable.
app.sidebarLoadFailed: The navigation panel failed to load. Switch workspaces or restart the application.

bootPhase.waitingForSession: Waiting for a secure backend connection…

app.diagnosticUnavailable: Diagnostics will be available after the secure backend connection is loaded.

nav.noActiveAccount: Select an active account before working with mail.

search.label: Search messages
search.promptEnterQuery: Enter a search query in the sidebar.

messages.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {{count} selected message} other {{count} selected messages}}
messages.bulkActionsAvailable: Bulk actions above the list: delete, mark read, move.
messages.permanentDeleteConfirm: {count, plural, one {Permanently delete {count} message from the trash?} other {Permanently delete {count} messages from the trash?}} This action cannot be undone.

grouping.revealed: {count, plural, one {Showing {count} more message} other {Showing {count} more messages}}
grouping.selectedConversations: {count, plural, one {{count} conversation selected} other {{count} conversations selected}}

detail.notFound: This message is no longer available — it may have been moved or deleted. We've refreshed the list.

remoteImages.allowError: Could not add the sender to your trusted list. Please try again.

compose.heading: New message

unsavedDialog.title: You have unsaved changes
unsavedDialog.description: This draft contains changes that are not safely saved yet.

discardDialog.title: Discard the message?
discardDialog.description: The message you are writing will be discarded.
discardDialog.descriptionDraftDeleted: The message you are writing will be discarded. Its draft will be deleted.

attachmentReminder.title: Send without an attachment?
attachmentReminder.description: The message mentions an attachment, but none is attached.

compose.dropAttachmentsHint: Drop files here or paste an attachment from the clipboard.
compose.dropAttachmentsActive: Drop files to attach them to the message.
compose.attachmentTooLarge: Attachment {name} is larger than the {limit} limit.
compose.attachmentsTooLarge: Total attachment size must not exceed {limit}.
compose.largeAttachmentConfirm: {count, plural, one {This attachment is larger than {limit}. Load it into memory?} other {{count} attachments are larger than {limit}. Load them into memory?}}
compose.errorAttachmentStillReading: An attachment is still loading. Wait for it to finish and try again.

accounts.heading: Accounts
accounts.none: Start by adding an email account.
accounts.emptyDescription: Start with an email address. Known providers are prefilled automatically, and other accounts can use custom IMAP/SMTP settings.
accounts.oauthProviderMissing: OAuth sign-in is not configured for this provider.

form.label: Account
form.accountNameHint: Just for your reference, e.g. “Work” or “Personal mail”.
form.emailHint: The address you'll send mail from.
form.displayNameHint: Shown to recipients as the sender.
form.signatureHint: Added to the end of new messages. You can edit it before sending.
form.signatureAutoInsert: Insert the signature automatically into new messages
form.serverModeSwitchToProviderWarning: Picking a provider template will overwrite your current IMAP/SMTP settings with the template values.
form.serverModeSwitchToCustomWarning: Switching to custom settings clears the link to the provider template.
form.customServerHint: Enter the host and ports for both your incoming (IMAP) and outgoing (SMTP) servers. You'll find these in your e-mail provider's documentation.
form.starttlsNote: STARTTLS is not yet supported — for most providers, pick SSL/TLS on ports 993 (IMAP) and 465 (SMTP).
form.errorHostTooLong: Host must be at most 255 characters.
form.usernameHint: For most providers this is your e-mail address.
form.passwordEditHint: — leave empty to keep the current one
form.appPasswordWarning: {provider} requires an app password, not your main account password.
form.oauthAvailable: {provider} supports secure sign-in, so you don't need a password.
form.errorPasswordRequiredForTest: Enter a password before testing a new account.
form.testConnectionSuccess: IMAP and SMTP connection were verified successfully.

accounts.newPageDescription: Enter your e-mail. If we know the domain, we'll set up the account automatically.

wizard.useImapInstead: Use IMAP and an app password
wizard.oauthPageDescription: Finish signing in with your provider.
wizard.oauthWaitingPageDescription: Finish signing in in your browser — we'll pick up here when you're done.
wizard.oauthWaitingHeading: Waiting for the browser to finish…
wizard.oauthWaitingHint: Once you sign in to {email}, we'll add it automatically.
wizard.oauthWaitingTimeout: OAuth sign-in is taking longer than expected. If you finished it in your browser, the account may already have been added — check the account list, or try again.
wizard.formPageDescription: Review the account details and add your mail server credentials.

gmail.description: You will now be securely redirected to Google. You enter your password directly with Google — our app never sees it or stores it.

outlook.description: You will now be securely redirected to Microsoft. You enter your password directly with Microsoft — our app never sees it or stores it.

contacts.formHint: Name is optional; at least one e-mail is required.
contacts.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {{count} selected contact} other {{count} selected contacts}}
contacts.bulkActionsAvailable: Bulk actions on the list: merge, delete.
contacts.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {count, plural, one {{count} selected contact} other {{count} selected contacts}}?
contacts.mergeDialogIntro: Pick the primary contact — the others will be merged into it and deleted. Name, surname and primary e-mail come from the primary contact; e-mails from the rest are added without duplicates and notes are concatenated.
contacts.mergeNeedsTwo: Select at least two contacts to merge.
contacts.mergePreviewHeading: After merge ({count, plural, one {{count} e-mail} other {{count} e-mails}})
contacts.mergeLimitWarning: After merge the contact would have {count} e-mails, maximum is {max}. Reduce the address count in one of the contacts before merging.
contacts.emptyLabeled: No contacts with the {label} label. Assign labels to addresses in the contact form.
contacts.discardEditDescription: You have unsaved edits to this contact. Continuing will discard them.
contacts.noActiveAccount: Select an active account before working with contacts.
contacts.vcardImportHint: Contacts will be imported into this account.
contacts.vcardImportNoFiles: The selected file is not a vCard (.vcf).
contacts.vcardImportEmpty: The vCard file contained no contacts with an e-mail.

appearance.intro: Adjust the theme and message reading layout.

theme.heading: Theme
theme.hint: Takes effect immediately. "System" follows the OS preference.
theme.label: Theme

textSize.heading: Text size
textSize.hint: Scales the whole interface up or down. Takes effect immediately.
textSize.label: Text size

readingPane.heading: Reading pane
readingPane.hint: Choose whether message details appear next to the list, below it, or stay hidden until you open a message.
readingPane.label: Reading pane layout
readingPane.empty: Select a message from the list and its detail will appear here.

splitPane.vertical: Resize the message list and detail panes
splitPane.horizontal: Resize the message list and detail panes vertically

grouping.heading: Mail grouping
grouping.label: Group messages in a folder
grouping.hint: Choose whether messages appear individually or grouped into conversations (one row per thread).

messageBody.heading: Message body rendering
messageBody.label: Default rendering of message body
messageBody.hint: Choose how message bodies are rendered. The choice applies to all messages until you change it again.

language.intro: Language changes apply immediately in the UI and in the accessibility metadata used by screen readers.
language.heading: Application language
language.hint: The change applies immediately. The HTML lang attribute is updated so screen readers use the correct pronunciation.
language.label: Language

shortcuts.intro: A list of shortcuts available in the application.

keys.listNavCombo: Arrows, Home / End, Ctrl+Home / Ctrl+End, Page Up / Down

actions.closeMessage: Close the message and return focus to the list
actions.listPrevNextCell: Previous / next cell in the row
actions.listRowStartEnd: First / last cell of the row
actions.listDeleteMessage: Delete the message on the focused row
actions.contactsListNav: Move between contact list cells (action buttons included)
actions.cancelContactForm: Cancel creating or editing a contact
actions.keepFocus: Move to the next item in the palette
actions.keepFocusBack: Move to the previous item in the palette

scopes.messageGrid: Works in the message list and in search results.
scopes.contactForm: Works in the contact form; asks first when there are unsaved changes.
scopes.mailOrSettings: Works anywhere, including text fields, while Mail or Settings is active.
scopes.contacts: Works anywhere, including text fields, while Contacts is active.
scopes.compose: Works while composing a new message.
scopes.openMessage: Works while a message is open.
scopes.palette: Works while the command palette is open.

accounts.description: Manage connected mailboxes, sign-in, and synchronisation.

about.intro: Basic application information and mail service connection status.

channel.label: Update channel
channel.hint: Beta receives new versions earlier, for testing before the stable release. The choice takes effect on the next update check.

update.unsupported: Update checks are available in the desktop app.
update.none: You are using the latest version.
update.failed: The update check could not be completed.

connection.heading: Application status
connection.lastSyncValue: {folder} — {count, plural, =0 {no new messages} one {{count} new message} other {{count} new messages}}
connection.ready: The application is connected to the mail service.
connection.loading: The application is connecting to the mail service…
connection.error: The application cannot connect to the mail service.
connection.idle: The mail service connection has not been checked yet.
connection.errorHint: Try reconnecting. If the problem continues, check whether the mail service is running.

session.heading: Technical diagnostics
session.dumpHint: ZIP without passwords, tokens, or message contents.

licenses.heading: Open-source licenses
licenses.intro: VoxRox Mail bundles open-source components. The full third-party notices and license texts are listed below.
licenses.unsupported: Open-source licenses are available in the desktop app.
licenses.loadFailed: The license file could not be loaded.

palette.title: Commands
palette.hint: Type to filter, use arrows to move and Enter to run.
palette.placeholder: Search for a command or action…
palette.resultsLive: {count, plural, one {{count} matching command} other {{count} matching commands}}

auth.heading: Sign-in finished
auth.description: You can close this window. Returning to account management in {countdown, plural, one {{countdown} second} other {{countdown} seconds}}.

prompt.title: Version {version} is available
prompt.description: You are using version {currentVersion}. The update will be downloaded and installed by the built-in updater.

failure.title: Update failed
failure.description: The app could not verify or install the update. Try again later.

toast.newMessages: {count, plural, one {{count} new message} other {{count} new messages}}, {account}, {folder}
toast.sendFailedRecoveryDraft: Couldn’t send the message to {recipient}. The content is saved in Drafts.
toast.sendUnverified: Couldn’t verify the send outcome for {recipient} — check the Sent folder.
